<!--
Thank you for contributing to ReviewRanger! New puzzles are especially welcome.
You do not need to be a programmer. Fill in what applies and delete the rest.
-->

## What is this?

<!-- One or two sentences. e.g. "Adds a new 'edges' puzzle about freezing temperature." -->

## If you added or changed a puzzle, please confirm:

- [ ] Every `lines` number exists in the snippet (the first line is line 1).
- [ ] Every finding has a `summary`, a `why`, a `rule`, and a `fix`.
- [ ] The wording is plain: short sentences, active voice, no idioms.
- [ ] Nothing reads as blame, failure, or "wrong", and no red was added.
- [ ] The snippet is **original** — not copied from any real project, book, or article.
- [ ] Any new symbol used in the snippet has a plain-English entry in the `glossary`.
- [ ] The puzzle's `id` is new and unique.
- [ ] I opened the app (locally or via my fork's GitHub Pages) and the puzzle appears.

## Anything else?

<!-- Notes for the reviewer, questions, or "first time contributing!" — all welcome. -->

---

By contributing, you agree your code is under GPL-3.0 and your content is under
CC BY-SA 4.0, as described in CONTRIBUTING.md. Welcome aboard — you belong here.
